steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with album displayed

steps.action: Click Reroll button to trigger new album load
steps.expected: New album enters with fade-in animation (opacity and transform transition)
steps.observed: New album entered smoothly with album-enter animation class applied (320ms ease-out with opacity 0→1 and translateY(10px)→0) and scale(0.98)→1

steps.expected: New album enters with fade-in animation on mobile
steps.observed: New album entered smoothly on mobile as well

evidence.codeAnalysis: Animation defined in index.css: @keyframes album-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px) scale(0.98); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } } with album-enter class applying animation in 320ms ease-out

steps.action: Click Reroll button to trigger loading state
steps.expected: During loading, diagonal light sheen animation sweeps across album cover
steps.observed: Sheen animation triggered during reroll via cover-sheen::after pseudo-element with is-active class applying cover-sheen animation (1.2s ease-out)

evidence.codeAnalysis: Sheen animation defined: @keyframes cover-sheen { 0% { transform: translateX(-120%) skewX(-12deg); opacity: 0; } 25%, 75% { opacity: 0.15; } 100% { transform: translateX(120%) skewX(-12deg); opacity: 0; } } - triggered by 'is-active' class on cover-sheen element during loading, sweeping diagonally across the cover

steps.observed: Page loaded with initial album displayed

steps.expected: Each transition is smooth with no abrupt jumps
steps.observed: Multiple rerolls performed successfully - each transition included: loading overlay fade-in, previous album blurred, new album smoothly entering with album-enter animation. No abrupt visual jumps observed.

steps.action: Click Reroll multiple times on mobile (2 rerolls)
steps.observed: Smooth transitions observed on mobile as well
No console errors found during any transition

evidence.codeAnalysis: Transition includes: loading state triggers -> loading overlay with Loader2 spinner -> cover-sheen with is-active class for sheen animation -> new album image with album-enter class for fade-in -> transition-duration-500 for smooth 500ms hover transition. The img element has key={albumKey} causing React to remount on new album, ensuring clean animation reset.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all passed. VAL-LOAD-004 (Album Enter Animation) confirmed working with 320ms fade-in animation. VAL-LOAD-005 (Cover Sheen Animation) confirmed working with 1.2s diagonal sweep during loading. VAL-LOAD-008 (Smooth Crossfade Between Albums) confirmed working with no abrupt jumps - transitions include loading overlay, blur on title, and smooth album-enter animation. All tests passed on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. No console errors detected during any transition.
